snapshot.title: Roadmap tasks are completed one checkbox at a time
snapshot.context: The repository roadmap is the canonical implementation checklist for Codex-Mem work.
snapshot.resolution: Read .codex/ROADMAP.md and context files before work, complete the first unchecked task only, run smoke validation, then mark that task done.

snapshot.title: Memory entries support file path scopes
snapshot.context: Codex-Mem needs memories to apply to specific files or directories for retrieval and conflict handling.
snapshot.resolution: Use file_paths on MemoryCreate/MemoryEntry, store it as JSON in SQLite, include it in exports and ranking text, support search filtering with path, and only supersede same-title memories when their scopes overlap or one side is unscoped.

snapshot.title: Injection observability records trace rows
snapshot.context: Codex-Mem needs to explain what memory was injected into a turn and why.
snapshot.resolution: Store each injection in injection_traces with query, limits, candidate count, injected entries, scores, and ranking reasons; expose the latest trace at GET /memory/debug/injection and include it in /memory/inject responses.

snapshot.title: Conflicting memories use latest-wins status metadata
snapshot.context: Codex-Mem needs conflict handling before full update/edit support exists.
snapshot.resolution: When storing a new active memory with the same type, project, and normalized title, mark older active entries superseded, set their superseded_by to the new ID, and store conflict_ids links on both sides through history snapshots.

snapshot.title: Memory history uses immutable snapshots
snapshot.context: Codex-Mem needs auditable memory changes without depending on future edit support.
snapshot.resolution: Create memory_history with per-memory versions and record create/delete snapshots transactionally; export .codex/HISTORY.json and expose GET /memory/history.
